# HIGH PRIORITY: Equipment Procurement (Piranometer, GPS, Tablets)

**Issue Type:** Blocker (required before Feb 15 Go/No-Go)

**Problem:**
Field equipment (solar irradiance meter, GPS units, tablets) has not been procured. Equipment is needed for baseline surveys starting Feb 26.

**Current State:**
- Spec: drafted
- RFQ: not issued
- Lead time: ~3-4 weeks required
- Deadline for ordering: Feb 12

**Owner:** Logistics / Procurement

**Equipment List:**
- Piranometer (solar irradiance measurement)
- GPS units (4x, for location data)
- Rugged tablets (4x, for survey forms)

**Estimated Effort:** 7 days (RFQ, supplier evaluation, PO, logistics)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] RFQ issued to 3+ suppliers
- [ ] Quotes evaluated and supplier selected
- [ ] PO issued no later than Feb 12
- [ ] Delivery confirmed for Feb 20 or earlier
- [ ] Equipment tested and accepted
- [ ] Checklist item 1.42 marked ✅

**References:**
- File: `translations/pt/docs/CHECKLIST_CONCLUSAO_PROJETO.md` (line 105)
- Checklist item: 1.42 | Equipamento de Campo (Encomendas)
- Spec: equipment list in PROJECT_MANAGEMENT/GANNT_MASTER_FEB2026.md
